suggestions.title: Post-swap version check can produce false positives
suggestions.recommendation: Use an immutable deployment identifier and assert target-after equals source-before (and differs from target-before).

suggestions.title: Smoke-test HTTP calls have no timeout controls
suggestions.recommendation: Add curl --connect-timeout and --max-time in pre/post smoke test calls.

suggestions.title: No concurrency guard for manual promotions
suggestions.recommendation: Add workflow concurrency configuration to serialize slot promotion runs.
